title: gentiana scabra subvar. orientalis
intro: Gentiana scabra subvar. orientalis, also known as the lesser gentian or Japanese gentian, is a species of flowering plant in the gentian family that is native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Gentiana scabra subvar. orientalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Gentiana scabra subvar. orientalis can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried root, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
